name: thoughtbox
description: Code-mode-first MCP gateway for discovering and calling Dedalus Marketplace tools through a two-tool surface

DEDALUS_API_KEY.title: Dedalus API Key
DEDALUS_API_KEY.description: Dedalus API key, sent as Authorization: Bearer <key>. Used to call Marketplace tools via thoughtbox_execute.

tools.name: thoughtbox_search
tools.description: Search the live Dedalus Marketplace tool catalog using JavaScript

tools.name: thoughtbox_execute
tools.description: Execute JavaScript using the tb SDK to call proxied Marketplace tools
